think.notes: Reverse-engineering approach defined. Winner definition, pre-move analysis methodology, and validation gates specified. Pipeline building explicitly deferred until discovery is validated.

research.notes: Full research cycle complete. 8 characteristics replicated OOS. Winner profile: high volatility, wide ranges, deep drawdowns, elevated volume, price near lows. Contrarian/volatility-breakout edge.

classify.notes: Edge is regime-stable across all market conditions. 7/8 replicated characteristics survive bull/bear/sideways. Edge strongest in low-volatility regimes (stocks with high relative volatility stand out), weakest in strong bull. Activation rules, deactivation rules, and risk rules defined. Documented in FINDINGS.md.
Research complete: 8 validated characteristics. Ready to determine which market regimes the winner profile survives and define activation/deactivation rules.

design.notes: Complete strategy specification added to FINDINGS.md. Entry rules (5 conditions), exit rules (profit target, stop loss, time stop, trailing stop, emergency exit), position sizing (equal weight with regime multipliers), risk management (daily/weekly/portfolio limits), and failure conditions defined. Ready for backtesting.

validate.notes: Multi-horizon backtest completed. 20-day horizon best: CAGR 4.67%, MaxDD -9.48%, Win Rate 55%, Profit Factor 1.40, 189 trades. Edge is real but modest. User accepted as low-risk diversifier. Full validation report appended to FINDINGS.md.

research.notes: Completed original run + iteration. 8 characteristics replicated OOS. 20-day horizon selected as optimal. Research complete.

classify.notes: Edge regime-stable across all conditions. Activation/deactivation rules defined.

build.notes: 6 tasks completed. All modules built: signal_generator, portfolio, main, report, dashboard. CAGR 3.93%, MaxDD -6.49%, 219 trades on 3-year window.
